  ARTIFACT CHAIN CONTRACT
  Written by:   requirement-analyst

  Consumed by:  planner (Tasks come from User Stories + FRs), solution-architect (drivers come from FRs + SCs)
  Rule:         every [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] must be resolved or explicitly accepted by the user
                before planner starts.
-->

## User Stories

**Acceptance criteria (Gherkin):**

```gherkin
Given {{initial state}}
When {{action}}
Then {{expected outcome}}
```

## Success Criteria

{{out_of_scope}}
